transcript: Hello everyone, Malisha from Streamflow. That was close enough. I'm here to talk about idle cash reserves and how to not lose money. First briefly about Streamflow, I'm sure most of you here have already heard about Streamflow as we have been helping Solana token projects since 2021, so for over four years now, with their token operations. With vesting, airdrops, token staking, token locks, and different types of programmable large-scale token distributions. We have helped Bonk, Kamino, Zeus, io.net, Wormhole, Raydium, Metaplex, MetaDAO, and 30,000 different token projects with their operations, and we have distributed tokens to 1.5 million different wallets. And we will continue to do so, continue to streamline financial operations. But I want to tell a story about the idle cash reserves and how not to lose money, as I said. And the story is about this founder who raised around 30 million dollars back in the previous bull market, at the peak of the bull market. And soon after he raised, the market just went south. We entered the bear market, and he had to adjust, like normally. It was an unknown territory, uncertain market conditions. And what this guy did is he took the investment money, took his company treasury, put it into T-bills. And Treasury bills rates started going up, and this company was essentially making a hundred thousand dollars every month from T-bills yield and completely financing its company operations throughout the bear market from the yield without ever touching the principal. And I think it was a smart decision because on the other side, there was me, as a startup founder who didn't do that. And for 18 months, we just kept our company treasury in USDC, a stablecoin that gave you zero yield. And when we did the math, we figured out that we have lost around 6% of our treasury value just because of devaluation and because of the opportunity cost. And this is why... and by the way, why I didn't do this is because, first of all, I didn't know this was an option. You live, you learn. And second of all, even if I knew back in the day, I don't think there was an option for us as a crypto company to actually have access to these US Treasuries and to the yield. And this is why we want to continue streamlining financial operations for people, for organizations, and we want to bridge this gap. We want to give the knowledge and the access to everyone essentially and bring internet capital markets on Solana. And one way to do this is in partnership with M Zero, we are launching USD+. Thank you. So, what is USD+? It's a stablecoin, exclusively on Solana. Value is one dollar, pegged to a dollar. It's backed entirely by US Treasuries, the most pristine collateral, the most trusted asset in the world, fully transparent with all the backings and transparency dashboards available. It's available globally for everyone, whether you have a hundred dollars, a hundred thousand dollars, a hundred million dollars that are just for whatever reason sitting idly at the moment, you can use them and earn and have exposure to US T-bills yield. And the best part, in my personal opinion, is this yield from T-bills yield is daily being distributed to token holders without any further action needed. No locking, no staking, no jumping through the hoops, no DeFi protocol whatsoever, just exposure to the yield. It's launching within few weeks, we expect it by the end of the year. So please, if you're interested, go to usd-plus.com and sign up for the waitlist if you want to reap the benefits of this. And if you want to talk more about this, we have our tent in the outside area. We have a little event going on right now, so please join us there and let's earn yield.

enrichment.generated_query: USD+ Streamflow Solana Breakpoint 2025 official announcement blog technical docs

sources.title: Anatomy of a $285M DeFi Contagion: The Stream Finance xUSD Collapse
sources.snippet:
Anatomy of a $285M DeFi Contagion: The Stream Finance xUSD Collapse
[Skip to main content](#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)
# Anatomy of a $285M DeFi Contagion: The Stream Finance xUSD Collapse
November 8, 2025·39 min read
[![Dora Noda](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/38552114?v=4)](https://github.com/doranoda)
[Dora Noda](https://github.com/doranoda)
Software Engineer
[](https://x.com/BlockEdenHQ)[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dora-noda-35952622a/)[](https://github.com/doranoda)
Open in ChatGPT
![](https://opengraph-image.blockeden.xyz/api/og-blockeden-xyz?title=Anatomy%20of%20a%20%24285M%20DeFi%20Contagion%3A%20The%20Stream%20Finance%20xUSD%20Collapse)
On November 4, 2025, Stream Finance disclosed a**$93 million loss**from an external fund manager, triggering one of the year's most significant stablecoin failures. Within 24 hours, its yield-bearing token xUSD plummeted**77% from $1.00 to $0.26**, freezing $160 million in user deposits and exposing over**$285 million in interconnected debt**across the DeFi ecosystem. This wasn't a smart contract hack or oracle manipulation—it was an operational failure that revealed fundamental flaws in the emerging "looping yield" economy and the hybrid CeDeFi model.
The collapse matters because it exposes a dangerous illusion: protocols promising DeFi's transparency and composability while depending on opaque off-chain fund managers. When the external manager failed, Stream had no on-chain emergency tools to recover funds, no circuit breakers to limit contagion, and no redemption mechanism to stabilize the peg. The result was a reflexive bank run that cascaded through Elixir's deUSD stablecoin (which lost 98% of value) and major lending protocols like Euler, Morpho, and Silo.
Understanding this event is critical for anyone building or investing in DeFi. Stream Finance operated for months with**4x+ leverage through recursive looping**, turning $160 million in user deposits into a claimed $520 million in assets—a accounting mirage that collapsed under scrutiny. The incident occurred just one day after the $128 million Balancer exploit, creating a perfect storm of fear that accelerated the depeg. Now, three weeks later, xUSD still trades at $0.07-0.14 with no path to recovery, and hundreds of millions remain frozen in legal limbo.
## Background: Stream Finance's high-leverage yield machine[​](#background-stream-finances-high-leverage-yield-machine)
Stream Finance launched in early 2024 as a multi-chain yield aggregator operating across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Avalanche, and other networks. Its core proposition was deceptively simple: deposit USDC and receive xUSD, a yield-bearing wrapped token that would generate passive returns through "institutional-grade" DeFi strategies.
The protocol deployed user funds across 50+ liquidity pools using**recursive looping strategies**that promised yields up to 12% on stablecoins—roughly triple what users could earn on platforms like Aave (4.8%) or Compound (3%). Stream's activities spanned lending arbitrage, market making, liquidity provision, and incentive farming. By late October 2025, the protocol reported approximately**$520 million in total assets under management**, though actual user deposits totaled only around $160 million.
This discrepancy wasn't an accounting error—it was the feature. Stream employed a leverage amplification technique that worked like this: User deposits $1 million USDC →receives xUSD →Stream uses $1M as collateral on Platform A →borrows $800K →uses that as collateral on Platform B →borrows $640K →repeats. Through this recursive process, Stream transformed $1 million into roughly $3-4 million in deployed capital, quadrupling its effective leverage.
**xUSD itself was not a traditional stablecoin**but rather a tokenized claim on a leveraged yield portfolio. Unlike purely algorithmic stablecoins (Terra's UST) or fully-reserved fiat-backed stablecoins (USDC, USDT),

Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform  | Drift Updates

## Introducing Drift v3: Built to Outperform
December 4, 2025
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6310e7dee49f08e5798eed50/693023e13e4b72ada17e0fe2_2025-12-03%2017.19.13.jpg)
[
Contents
](#)
[
Contents
](#)
[
](https://twitter.com/driftprotocol)[
](https://discord.com/invite/fMcZBH8ErM)
[
Trade Now
](https://app.drift.trade/)
![]()
![]()
Drift v3 is the protocol’s biggest performance upgrade yet. Rebuilt around trader execution, v3 delivers**10x faster fills, 10x improved liquidity, and a cleaner, more intuitive interface**than v2.
This upgrade was built for one thing: outperformance. Instant execution. Deeper liquidity. A suite of tools that helps you trade faster and with more confidence.
Drift v2 was the first to bring cross-margin and multi-asset collateral to DeFi on-chain trading. We built on Solana to deliver NASDAQ-level performance on-chain and with major Solana upgrades like Alpenglow, Firedancer and Jito’s Block Assembly Market (BAM), Drift is built to outperform as the network scales.
Since launch, Drift has surpassed 1.5B in TVL, $133B+ in total trading volume and $650M in open interest. Drift v3 is built to take those numbers and your trading even further.
**Drift v3 will be available on Dec 4, 2025.**New users will need an invite code to access Drift v3.
**DM**[**@DriftProtocol**](https://x.com/DriftProtocol)**to request access.**
## Why v3?
Drift v3 represents the protocol’s next stage of maturity: the point where years of infrastructure, liquidity, and execution improvements converge into a faster, clearer, more reliable trading experience.
**Over the past year, Drift has evolved in three critical areas:**
1. Execution speed
2. Liquidity depth
3. Trader experience## How Drift v3 outperforms
*The road to v3 was focused on improving liquidity, trading execution and speed. Here’s what that looks like in practice:*
### **Trading Execution and Speed**
* **10x faster order fills:**On Drift v3, 85% of market orders are filled within the same slot. A slot is Solana’s smallest time unit (about 400 milliseconds). On Drift, that means that trades are executed in under half a second. Instant execution.
* **15x faster take profit/stop loss triggers:**For BTC, it dropped from 15 slots (\~6 seconds) to 1 slot (\~0.4 seconds). This means your risk controls and exits now trigger immediately, reducing slippage and missed opportunities.
* **Gasless trading by default:**Unlike other DEXs, where you pay gas on every trade, Drift abstracts gas fees so that’s one less thing to worry about eating into profits
* **400ms oracle updates**: Prices update every 400 millisecond (roughly 2.5 times per second). This keeps quotes accurate and reduces the chance of stale pricing.
* **Scales with Solana:**As Solana increases block size and throughput, Drift automatically gets faster too, handling more trades per second.### **Liquidity**
* **10x reduction in slippage on market orders:**In Drift v2, large market orders could move the price by 20 bps. In v3, that’s been cut to just 2 bps. Traders now get far better pricing, especially on size.
* **5x tighter TP/SL execution:**Take-profit and stop-loss orders are far more precise. On major markets like SOL and BTC, fills are 4x tighter, while non-majors see up to 5x improvement. This means exits trigger closer to the price you set, reducing losses and protecting gains.
* **Introduction of Drift Liquidity Provider (DLP)**: Provides liquidity for both Perps and Spot markets. Community members can deposit funds into DLP to support market-making and earn a share of the pool's profits. Currently in the testing stage. Public launch in Q1 2026.
* **Expanded Market Maker Program:**With v3’s expanded market maker initiatives, long-tail altcoins now hav

sources.title: River’s Actions and Follow-Up on the Recent Market Event
sources.snippet:
[Announcement](https://blog.river.inc/tag/announcement/)·Nov 10, 2025·3 min read

# River’s Actions and Follow-Up on the Recent Market Event

Why We Temporarily Suspended River Pts Conversion

- [River](https://blog.river.inc/author/river/)

Over the past few days, River Pts price experienced extreme volatility. and we know many of you are frustrated, disappointed, and even angry.

Before anything else, we want to say this clearly: we understand how you feel — and we feel the same way.

What happened was not ordinary market movement.

It was an organized, coordinated attack targeting the River ecosystem and its River Pts conversion mechanism.

TL;DR

- A coordinated market manipulation targeted $RIVER through large short positions and concentrated Pts conversions.
- To prevent systemic collapse, the team temporarily suspended Pts conversion and executed market buybacks.
- Attackers quickly closed short positions following the suspension.
- We are now upgrading the mechanism, releasing data, and hosting an AMA to share our next steps.

### What Happened

Starting on Nov 7, we observed unusual and suspicious activity across multiple exchanges:

- Large short positions were opened simultaneously.
- Massive amounts of River Pts were converted to RIVER and immediately sold.
- Funding rates turned sharply negative.

This mirrored a “Soros-style attack”, where aggressors exploit weak liquidity conditions to create pressure on both spot and derivatives markets — triggering a chain reaction of panic and loss of confidence.

At first, we responded by buying back RIVER from the market to stabilize liquidity and sentiment.

However, when the same pattern reappeared on Nov 9, it became clear this was a deliberate, repeated manipulation — not random volatility.

RIVER Funding Rate

### Why We Temporarily Suspended River Pts Conversion

We know this was a painful and controversial decision.

Pausing conversion can make holders feel trapped — and we don’t take that lightly.

But leaving the mechanism open would have allowed attackers to amplify the pressure loop, using short positions and conversion flows to drain liquidity and collapse confidence entirely.

If we had done nothing, the likely outcome was a self-reinforcing spiral leading to total market failure.

It was, quite literally, a trolley-problem moment:

Do we stand by and watch the entire ecosystem collapse — or do we pull the brake to protect the long-term interests of the majority?

We chose the latter.

**After the suspension, we observed attackers closing their shorts rapidly, confirming that the decision successfully prevented a deeper crash.**

### Taking Responsibility and Next Steps

We fully acknowledge our responsibility in this.

This incident exposed a structural weakness in the River Pts conversion design — one we must now strengthen.

Here’s what we’re doing next:

1. Redesigning the River Pts conversion mechanism with improved risk controls to prevent coordinated exploitation.
2. Publishing on-chain and exchange data to explain the event transparently.
3. Hosting a community AMA – We will take responsibility, address the issues promptly, and listen carefully to community feedback.
4. Continuing strategic buybacks and stabilization measures before reopening conversion under a safer model.

### To Our Community and Holders

We hear your criticism and frustration. We know that trust is earned through actions, not words — and we intend to prove that over time.

We have never engaged in short-term trading or profit-seeking behavior.

We have turned down multiple offers for “volatility-driven” partnerships because we believe RIVER should grow organically and sustainably.

$RIVER price action since TGE: short-term volatility and long-term vision

This attack was a harsh reminder — but it also showed us what kind of project we want to be:

Transparent, resilient, and focused on long-term value.

To everyone who continues to stand with us — thank you.

We will keep moving for

editorial.headline: Streamflow Taps M Zero for USD+: A T-Bill Yield Engine for Solana Treasuries
editorial.standfirst: Streamflow pivots from token operations to capital efficiency, launching a transparent, yield-bearing stablecoin to plug the "6% inflation leak" in startup treasuries.
key_takeaways: Streamflow partners with **M Zero** (M0) to launch **USD+**, a stablecoin fully backed by US Treasuries.
Yield is distributed daily directly to wallets, removing the need for staking, locking, or smart contract interaction.
The product targets the idle capital of Streamflow's 30,000 institutional clients, including **Bonk**, **Wormhole**, and **Kamino**.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a direct response to the capital inefficiency plaguing crypto treasuries, **Streamflow** has unveiled **USD+**, a yield-bearing stablecoin backed exclusively by US Treasury bills. Announced by Malisha Stanojevic at Breakpoint, the product marks a significant strategic expansion for Streamflow, moving beyond its stronghold in token vesting and distribution to tackle the "lazy capital" problem that costs startups roughly 6% annually in inflation and opportunity costs.

The architecture of USD+ leverages **M Zero** (M0) middleware to ensure transparency and solvency—a critical differentiator in a market recently spooked by the collapse of opaque yield aggregators. unlike the "black box" strategies that have plagued DeFi, USD+ relies on what Stanojevic calls "pristine collateral": short-term US T-bills. The yield mechanism is designed for institutional inertia; it distributes returns daily to token holders automatically, eliminating the operational friction of staking, locking, or managing DeFi positions. This allows treasuries to remain liquid while generating revenue, effectively turning idle runway into a productive asset.

This move represents a formidable vertical integration for Streamflow. Having already processed token operations for over 30,000 projects—including heavyweights like **Bonk**, **Zeus**, and **io.net**—and reaching 1.5 million wallets, Streamflow effectively controls the "plumbing" of the Solana ecosystem. By introducing USD+, they are positioned to capture the value flowing through these pipes, offering existing clients a seamless upgrade from zero-yield USDC to yield-bearing assets without leaving the Streamflow dashboard. This transition from operational tooling to "Internet Capital Markets" signals a maturing Solana infrastructure layer, where capital efficiency becomes the new standard for survival.
